notes:
- Downloads dropdown menu in the titlebar (IDM-style)
- Pause All / Start All / Delete All Completed actions
- Stop queue / Start queue toggle (parks new starts; running items keep going)
- Speed Limiter quick-pick (Off / 100 KB/s / 500 KB/s / 1 MB/s / 5 MB/s / Custom)
- Find (Ctrl-F) focuses the search box
- Find Next (F3) cycles through visible rows matching the search
